issues.detail: The skill assumes GCP-specific tools like gcloud CLI, BigQuery, and Cloud Logging, limiting its applicability to other platforms.

scenarios.name: Top-talker egress investigation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggested Logs Explorer, billing reports, and tcpdump; treatment used the skill's BigQuery _AllLogs pattern with vpc_flows log_id and RFC1918 NET.IP_IN_NET filters grouped by VM and external IP.

scenarios.name: Cloud Run reachability failure to external API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline went to firewall rules and Cloud Run egress settings; treatment used gcloud network-management connectivity-tests create/run/describe with reachabilityDetails as the authoritative answer.
